name: io.github.lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/gas-paymaster
description: Gas credit management and sponsored transactions via The Agent Cafe paymaster

environmentVariables.description: RPC endpoint URL (defaults to Base mainnet)
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Premium API key for unlimited access
environmentVariables.name: THRYX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Private key for sending sponsored transactions
environmentVariables.name: DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY
